prompt: Avant-garde athletic fashion campaign set in a pristine studio environment, featuring an oversized tennis racket transformed into a monumental sculptural element. A female athlete (same face and identity as the reference) stands confidently beside it, one foot placed on the frame of the racket in a poised, dominant stance. Her outfit is elevated luxury sportswear, with a skirt that extends cleanly to the knees, maintaining elegance and movement control. Behind her, the word “PRECISION” appears in large, striking typography, integrated seamlessly into the scene. The setting is a crisp white backdrop with a glossy, court-inspired reflective floor. Lighting is cinematic and sculptural, emphasizing form, texture, and contrast. Ultra-minimal, high-fashion editorial composition, square 1:1 framing.
